rows.src_en: Setting Google Organic SERP Tasks. Standard task-based endpoint. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call.
rows.desc_en: Queue a Google Organic SERP task for a keyword/location/language; you are charged only for posting, and up to 100 tasks can be sent per call. The response returns a task id used to collect the SERP later via the matching task_get endpoint or via postback/pingback.
rows.title_zh: 为给定 keyword/地区/语言提交一个 Google 自然搜索（Organic）SERP 任务；仅按提交计费，单次调用最多 100 个任务。响应返回 task id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点或 postback/pingback 收取 SERP。

rows.desc_en: Search term to query. URL-encode it; the SERP is built around this query.
rows.title_zh: 要查询的搜索词。需做 URL 编码；SERP 围绕该查询词构建。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

rows.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

rows.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
rows.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

rows.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

rows.desc_en: Number of SERP results to parse; deeper values cost more crawl pages and increase task price.
rows.title_zh: 要解析的 SERP 结果数量；取值越深消耗的抓取页数越多，任务价格也越高。

rows.desc_en: Upper bound on the number of SERP pages to crawl for this task.
rows.title_zh: 本任务抓取的 SERP 页面数上限。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, such as `desktop` or `mobile`; affects layout and result set.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，如 `desktop` 或 `mobile`，会影响版式与结果集合。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, refining the user-agent presented to Google.
rows.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，用于细化向 Google 呈现的 user-agent。

rows.src_en: Display related results as grouped organic results
rows.desc_en: When enabled, related organic results are merged and reported as grouped organic entries instead of separate items.
rows.title_zh: 启用后，相关的自然结果会被合并归组为分组自然条目，而非分散的独立条目。

rows.src_en: Calculate pixel rankings for SERP elements in advanced results
rows.desc_en: When enabled, pixel-coordinate rankings (rectangles) are computed for elements in the advanced SERP, useful for visual position analysis.
rows.title_zh: 启用后，会为高级 SERP 中的元素计算像素坐标排名（矩形框），便于做可视化位置分析。

rows.src_en: Postback URL for completed task results
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the completed task results once the task finishes.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后 DataForSEO 回调推送结果的你方接收端点。

rows.src_en: Pingback URL for task completion notification
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify you that the task is complete, without sending the payload.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知你方的 ping 端点，仅通知不发送结果数据。

rows.desc_en: Result format delivered to `postback_url`; choose the variant (such as advanced or html) matching how you want results pushed.
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；按你期望的推送方式选择对应变体（如 advanced 或 html）。

rows.desc_en: Your own identifier echoed back with the task, useful for correlating results with your records.
rows.title_zh: 随任务回显的你方自定义标识，便于将结果与你方记录关联。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.

rows.src_en: Get Google Organic HTML Results by id. Retrieve raw HTML results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

rows.title_zh: 按 task id 取回此前提交的 Google 自然搜索 SERP 任务的原始 HTML；提交后 30 天内可免费获取。

rows.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

rows.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

rows.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual SERP data is nested inside.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

rows.src_en: Task identifier of the completed task
rows.desc_en: Task id of the completed task, ready to be collected.
rows.title_zh: 已完成、可收取任务的 task id。

rows.desc_en: Relative URL to call to collect this task's advanced results.
rows.title_zh: 用于收取该任务高级结果的相对 URL。

rows.src_en: Get Google Finance Ticker Search Results by id. Returns advanced ticker search results for a previously posted task.
rows.desc_en: Retrieve advanced Google Finance Ticker Search results for a previously posted task by its id.
rows.title_zh: 按 task id 取回此前提交任务的 Google Finance Ticker Search 高级结果。

rows.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted.
rows.title_zh: 要取结果的任务 UUID，即提交任务时 `tasks[].id` 返回的值。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
rows.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

rows.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
rows.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

rows.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
rows.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

rows.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

rows.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual SERP data is nested inside.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。
